title: Asuka is 13 years of age really
display_title: Asuka is 13 years of age really
wikitext:
[]: Asuka is 13 years of age (really)             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 4:12 am Ok now im sure everybody knows how much of an eva fan by now and Im going to appologise to SSD now because I knew I was correct all along. Ok well today whilst out and about searching the streets of sydney I stumbled across a bookstore which happened to have some Evangelion books in it. Well I purchased the following books. Which I shall write up reviews on for the Evapedia. Evangelion:1.0 you are (not) alone. Entry file 1 Neon Genesis Evangelion Die Sterne (Ver.2.0) and the all important one... The Essential Evangleion Chronicle Side A. This book contains many interesting facts like Birthdates. It also contains information on each of the Eva series and further data. Well I know there are many Arguments on the DOB of Asuka but this is an offical book so I guess the EVAPEDIA will have to be changed Asukas DOB is 4 day of december in the year 2001. As Quoted "生年月日: A.D.2001/12/04"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 06, 2008 4:19 am The 4-Dec-01 date has been known for years, though there are a lot of people who refuse to accept it. There is a (somewhat archaic) Japanese custom of referring to someone as age N from the start of the year containing the Nth anniversary of their birth, though. Publication data for the book though (ISBN & such)?

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 4:23 am I knew that but could never find any phisical evidence Untill now but It looks like the wiki is wrong because it says 2000 lol hmm lets see if there is any information on Rei's birthdate

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Apr 06, 2008 6:49 am Nice find, Zeak. Can you find any info on the other characters' birthdates, just to cross-check? Megumi Hayashibara suggested her birthday for Rei (I think it was the 30th of January, or March), but Rei's birthday is officially "unknown" as far as I know.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 6:56 am Well im looking through them now I will upload the character information when I scan it. Still there is some interesting stuff in here on her from the new movie book. Also there is loads of information on all the characters and the Eva's but this is only the first book. Im going back on friday to get some more. Im scaning each book so I have a digital copy. Funny thing is I found a real copy of retake in there today lmao. still way overpriced and its in Japanese.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Apr 06, 2008 6:59 am Thanks, because I'm not sure who put in the character birthdays and from what source. And what do we do in case of a mess like this one? (Notice that Toji has two birthdays) http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-03/03_C240_big.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:03 am lol thats funny. Well both the Evangelion 1.0 and Evangelion Chronicles say that his DOB is A.D. 2001/12/16. I have notived a hell of a lot of date screwups in the anime. well not only that but stupid things like the blackboard whenthere doing algiba (*Shudders*) the equations are wrong lol. there are heeps of stupid thing like that. But the cool thing is now I have a few offical sorces I can work with.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:20 am UrsusArctos wrote: Thanks, because I'm not sure who put in the character birthdays and from what source.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:23 am 2001/12/16...Shinji? Even in Rebuild? And about Toji's B-day...oh noes indeed. (Yes, Tomokazu Seki is awesome).

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:35 am Hmm all I can find on Rei are those two dates I guessing because she is said to be 14 also so it may be just coinsodence that Rei 2 was borne on Rei 1's birthday. Im stil alittle sketchi ill post a scan up later Ok the character Birthdays then. Shinji: 2001/06/06 Rei: ?/?/2001 (ill keep looking more information yet read) Asuka: 2001/12/04 Misato: 1986/12/08 Gendo: 1967/04/29 Fuyutsuki: ?/04/09 (More information avaliable) Ritsuko: 1985/11/21 Kaji: 1985/06/17 Aoba: ?/5/5 (More information avaliable) Hyuga: ?/2/13 (More information avaliable) Maya: 1991/7/11 Toji: 2001/12/16 Kensuke: 2001/9/12 Hikari: 2002/2/18 This book is insane Ill have to finish scaning it so we can work on a translation. It has so much. for example Heightmaps of tokyo-3, battle layouts, plans of attack, equipment, Events... I goto get the next few parts

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:58 am There are ages quoted for the characters on various sites, but with no guarantee of how official they are. Rei cannot have a real 2001 birthdate, since she wasn't conjured into existence until three years later. Kozo is probably 9-Apr-57 I know that Touji was about the youngest, but hadn't realised Hikari was younger too.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Apr 06, 2008 8:02 am I think it says something about the seccond imact involving Rei somehow which could explain it im uploading the book covers into my shopping thread anyway

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 06, 2008 9:55 am According to Chronicle, Kozo is 1956/04/09. And Rei is "Unknown". For whatever reason, Chronicle has Asuka's age as "14" in spite of her birth date.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Apr 06, 2008 10:15 am Zeak wrote: Hmm all I can find on Rei are those two dates I guessing because she is said to be 14 also so it may be just coinsodence that Rei 2 was borne on Rei 1's birthday. Im stil alittle sketchi ill post a scan up later Ok the character Birthdays then. Shinji: 2001/06/06 Rei: ?/?/2001 (ill keep looking more information yet read) Asuka: 2001/12/04 Misato: 1986/12/08 Gendo: 1967/04/29 Fuyutsuki: ?/04/09 (More information avaliable) Ritsuko: 1985/11/21 Kaji: 1985/06/17 Aoba: ?/5/5 (More information avaliable) Hyuga: ?/2/13 (More information avaliable) Maya: 1991/7/11 Toji: 2001/12/16 Kensuke: 2001/9/12 Hikari: 2002/2/18 This book is insane Ill have to finish scaning it so we can work on a translation. It has so much. for example Heightmaps of tokyo-3, battle layouts, plans of attack, equipment, Events... I goto get the next few parts

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 06, 2008 10:30 am (A) He seems to be getting it from 'The Essential Evangelion Chronicle (Side A)', which I mention on the Wiki page but don't have much information about. (B) Like the original Die Sterne (see the old Eva Commentary page) but with some additional illustrations added on. Zeak should scan them for us.

[]:             Quote Post by EveAngel » Sun Apr 06, 2008 10:42 am I don't care if she's 13 or 14. Im still hitting it

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Apr 06, 2008 11:49 am EveAngel wrote: I don't care if she's 13 or 14. Im still hitting it

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sun Apr 06, 2008 11:52 am Asuka is 13 for most of the series, assuming Evangelion starts around Summer 2015. I'm not sure why people keep saying she's 14, because she really isn't except for the possibility of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 06, 2008 12:02 pm Because Ritsuko talks to Misato about using 14-year-olds in ep 4 Misato (OFF): He's only fourteen years old. It seems so cruel, making him bear the burden of mankind's destiny. RITSUKO (OFF): But we have no choice but to entrust the piloting of the Evas to fourteen year olds. Misato: I know. RITSUKO: So, has he called? RITSUKO: No?

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sun Apr 06, 2008 12:31 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Because Ritsuko talks to Misato about using 14-year-olds in ep 4
